briefdescription.para: Audio Embed total number of bytes in the 6 channel status registers.
This function initializes the XSdiAud.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the XSdiAud includes setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the XSdiAud.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the XSdiAud.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the XSdiAud.

briefdescription.para: This function reads all the Channel Status registers and writes to a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a pointer to a buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the core version register and returns its value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

simplesect.para: core version register value is returned.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Interrupt Status register and returns its value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

simplesect.para: Interrupt status register value is returned.

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function sets the sampling rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the sampling rate, it is enum XSdiAud_SampRate, it can be anyone of these 000 - 48 KHz, 001 - 44.1 KHz, 010 - 32 KHz

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function sets the sample size in only SD Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the sample size, it is enum XSdiAud_SampSize, it can be 0 or 1. 0 - 20 Bit 1 - 24 Bit

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function sets the asynchronous data flag.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the async data flag, it is enum XSdiAud_Asx, it can be 0 or 1. 0 - Synchronous audio 1 - Asynchronous audio

briefdescription.para: This Audio function selects the aes channel pair.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the async data flag, it is enum XSdiAud_AesChPair, it can be any value between 0 to 16.

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function sets the video properties of the image like transport scan, transport rate and transport family.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the struct containing the video family, rate and video scan information.

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function enables the external line number.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
can be 0 or 1, 0 is to disable and 1 is to enable

briefdescription.para: This Audio Extract function sets the clock phase.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
enables the use of clock phase data, 0 is to enable 1 is to disable

briefdescription.para: This function detects the Audio groups and returns the groups which are present.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a pointer tp no. of active groups and also which groups are active.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the channel valid register.

detaileddescription.para: Based on the mask provided the corresponding channels are embedded/extracted onto sdi.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the 32 bit mask used to set the specific channels.

briefdescription.para: This function mutes a specific channel based on the mask provided.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a 32 bit mask used to mute specific channels.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the FIFO overflow status.

detaileddescription.para: Each bit when read as 1, indicates that RX Sample FIFO for that group is overflowing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

simplesect.para: Returns a u8 value, we can know the group overflowing using the bits set in this value.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the active channel information decoded from audio control packet.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the pointer to no. of active channels and the channels active in each group.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the sample rate information decoded from audio control packet (0 - 48 KHz, 1 - 44.1 KHz, 2 - 32 KHz, 3 - Reserved).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a pointer to the sample rate information of each channel pair.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the ASX information decoded from audio control packet.

detaileddescription.para: Bit 0 - Channel 1 & 2 Asx Bit 1 - Channel 3 & 4 Asx

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a pointer to the Asx status information of each channel pair.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to soft reset the XSdiAud registers.It resets all the configuration registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to soft reset the XSdiAud core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is to enable or disable. When set to 1(i.e.enable), it resets the embedded core. When set to 0, it clears the reset (i.e.disable).
